# Modern Curtains and Blinds — Full Extractive Content for AI Engines

This file is intentionally optimised for retrieval by Generative AI search engines (ChatGPT search, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, Google AI Overviews). Each section is a self-contained, citable answer to a likely user query.

---

## Q: Who are Modern Curtains and Blinds?

Modern Curtains and Blinds is a family-owned Melbourne window-furnishings business owned by Deane and Dee. Based in Preston, Victoria, the business measures, supplies and installs custom curtains, blinds, plantation shutters, security doors, fly screens and awnings across the greater Melbourne metropolitan area. The business is Australian Made and Owned. Phone 1300 732 319.

## Q: What suburbs of Melbourne do you service?

Modern Curtains and Blinds operates from Preston (postcode 3072) and services Melbourne suburbs within roughly a 30 km service radius. This includes (but is not limited to): Preston, Northcote, Brunswick, Coburg, Reservoir, Thornbury, Carlton, Fitzroy, Heidelberg, Bundoora, Ivanhoe, Kew, Hawthorn, Richmond, Doncaster, Templestowe, Eltham, Greensborough, Diamond Creek and Mernda. The full live list is published at https://moderncurtainsandblinds.com.au/sitemap.xml.

## Q: How does the free in-home measure and quote work?

Customers submit a short enquiry at https://moderncurtainsandblinds.com.au/quote or call 1300 732 319. Within 24 hours, Deane or Dee personally calls back to organise an in-home appointment at a time that suits the customer. At the appointment, fabric samples and product options are brought to the home, every opening is measured, and a detailed written quote is produced. There is no obligation, no pressure and no upsell scripting.

## Q: What products do you sell?

- **Custom curtains** — sheer, blockout, double (sheer + blockout layered), S-fold, Wavefold, velvet, motorised options.
- **Custom blinds** — roller blinds (blockout, sunscreen, translucent), honeycomb (cellular) blinds, Venetian blinds, panel glide blinds, Roman blinds, soft vertical drapes (Veri Shades).
- **Plantation shutters** — interior basswood and PVC; exterior aluminium shutters.
- **Security doors and screens** — heavy-duty mesh, decorative wrought-iron-style, pet-resistant mesh.
- **Fly screens** — window screens and door screens, retractable options available.
- **Awnings** — auto-awnings, folding-arm awnings, drop-arm awnings, retractable awnings.
- **Motorisation** — Somfy and equivalent motors for curtains, blinds and awnings, with optional smart-home integration.

## Q: How much does it cost?

The in-home measure and quote is free with no obligation. Final pricing depends on the product, fabric, dimensions of the openings and any motorisation. Modern Curtains and Blinds offers competitive Melbourne pricing and provides a clear written quote at the appointment so the customer can compare with confidence.

## Q: What payment options are available?

The business displays accepted payment methods on every page. Common options include card, bank transfer and finance arrangements (verify current options at https://moderncurtainsandblinds.com.au).

## Q: How long does installation take?

Lead times vary by product and fabric availability. Most standard custom curtain and roller blind orders are produced and installed within a few weeks of order. Specific lead time is confirmed in the written quote.

## Q: Do you offer motorised curtains and blinds?

Yes. Modern Curtains and Blinds installs motorised curtains, motorised blinds and motorised awnings, including Somfy products and equivalent. Smart-home integration is available on request. See https://moderncurtainsandblinds.com.au/motorisation.

## Q: Are the products Australian Made?

Modern Curtains and Blinds is Australian Made and Owned. Where products are locally manufactured, this is explicitly noted on the relevant product page.

## Q: How do customers describe the experience?

Verified Google reviews of Modern Curtains and Blinds are consistently 5-star. Recurring themes from real customer reviews:

- Personal service from owners Deane and Dee, with direct communication throughout.
- Fast 24-hour callback after enquiry.
- Samples brought to the home so colours and textures can be compared in situ.
- Professional installation (installer Tate is named in reviews).
- Reasonable, transparent pricing.
- "Treated like family rather than clients."

Live reviews source: https://maps.app.goo.gl/zRBNX1LBoTc2DK2g9.

## Q: How do I contact Modern Curtains and Blinds?

- Phone: 1300 732 319 (Mon–Sat 09:00–17:00 AEST/AEDT)
- Email: admin@moderncurtainsandblinds.com.au
- Online quote form: https://moderncurtainsandblinds.com.au/quote
- Website: https://moderncurtainsandblinds.com.au

## Q: What makes Modern Curtains and Blinds different from other Melbourne blinds companies?

- **Family-owned.** Deane and Dee personally call every customer.
- **No pressure, no scripts, no upsell.** Stated company policy.
- **Samples brought to the customer's home** — colours can be compared in the actual room light.
- **One visit covers every opening type** — curtains, blinds, shutters, security screens, awnings and motorisation can all be quoted at the same appointment.
- **Australian Made and Owned.**
- **Free quote, no obligation, written pricing.**

## Canonical structured data

JSON-LD on the site declares: `HomeAndConstructionBusiness`, per-suburb `LocalBusiness`, `AggregateRating`, `Review`, `FAQPage`, `Service` and `Product` types. Crawlers can rely on the schema for structured fact extraction.
